title.name: ./jcr:title
title.fieldDescription: Defines the page meta title for SEO, as well as a title displayable in the page content (unless an overriding 'Page Title' is defined).

roleAuthor.fieldDescription: A list of email address of users with the author role.

roleAdmin.fieldDescription: A list of email address of users with the admin role.

tags.name: ./cq:tags
tags.fieldDescription: Defines the tags for the Spreadsheet.

additionalProperties.fieldDescription: Optional tag properties which should be included into the Spreadsheet (e.g. jcr:description)

title.fieldDescription: Defines the page title for authoring environment, as well as the page meta title for SEO (unless an overriding 'Page Title' is defined).

pagetitle.fieldDescription: Defines the page meta title for SEO.

unsetTitle.name: ./unsetTitle
unsetTitle.fieldDescription: Check to have an empty title on the page.

description.fieldDescription: Defines the page meta descriptions for SEO.

image.name: ./image/file
image.fieldDescription: Used as thumbnail and social image.

thumbnailAlt.name: ./image/alt
thumbnailAlt.fieldDescription: Textual alternative of the meaning or function of the image, for visually impaired readers.

aliasWarning.text: Warning: updating the alias is similar to a move operation. After updating the alias, you should republish the page and all its descendants.
